Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 92 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story 31 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 118 upvotes, 19 comments
  4. The Shape of Inequalities 79 upvotes, 14 comments
  5. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Successes and Breakdowns in Everyday Non-Display Smart Glasses Use 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 42 upvotes, 7 comments
  8. Tesla: Failure of the FSD's degradation detection system [pdf] 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  9. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce and shutting down next week 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 160 upvotes, 47 comments
  11. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 221 upvotes, 69 comments
  12. Prompt Injecting Contributing.md 91 upvotes, 29 comments
  13. Waymo 13x safer than human drivers 28 upvotes, 7 comments
  14. No AI in Node.js Core 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  15. Afroman found not liable in defamation case 1010 upvotes, 569 comments
  16. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 258 upvotes, 131 comments
  17. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 75 upvotes, 32 comments
  18. Astral to Join OpenAI 1039 upvotes, 650 comments
  19. “Your frustration is the product” 300 upvotes, 191 comments
  20. Juggalo makeup blocks facial recognition technology (2019) 202 upvotes, 125 comments
  21. An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD 204 upvotes, 138 comments
  22. Anthropic takes legal action against OpenCode 221 upvotes, 162 comments
  23. I turned Markdown into a protocol for generative UI 52 upvotes, 30 comments
  24. World Happiness Report 2026 99 upvotes, 67 comments
  25. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 34 upvotes, 18 comments
  26. A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta 83 upvotes, 56 comments
  27. Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code 23 upvotes, 13 comments
  28. Connecticut and the 1 Kilometer Effect 21 upvotes, 15 comments
  29. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 190 upvotes, 218 comments
  30. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 156 upvotes, 231 comments

Last generated 5:00am, 20 March 2026. Source here.
